name: krakenkey-cli
description: Tools for using the KrakenKey CLI for TLS certificate management and endpoint monitoring

tools.name: auth_login
tools.description: Save an API key to the local config file for subsequent requests

--api-key.description: API key (prompted interactively if not provided)

tools.name: auth_logout
tools.description: Remove the stored API key from the local config

tools.name: auth_status
tools.description: Show the current authenticated user's profile and resource counts

tools.name: auth_keys_list
tools.description: List all API keys for the authenticated user

tools.name: auth_keys_create
tools.description: Create a new API key. The key value is shown only once

tools.name: auth_keys_delete
tools.description: Delete an API key by ID

tools.name: domain_add
tools.description: Register a new domain and receive DNS verification instructions

tools.name: domain_list
tools.description: List all registered domains in a table (ID, Hostname, Verified, Created)

tools.name: domain_show
tools.description: Show full details for a domain including verification code

tools.name: domain_verify
tools.description: Trigger DNS TXT verification for a domain. The TXT record must already be set

tools.name: domain_delete
tools.description: Delete a registered domain

tools.name: endpoint_add
tools.description: Add a new monitored endpoint for TLS scanning. Subject to plan limits

tools.name: endpoint_list
tools.description: List all monitored endpoints in a table (ID, Host, Port, Label, Active, Regions, Created)

tools.name: endpoint_show
tools.description: Show full details for an endpoint including hosted regions

tools.name: endpoint_enable
tools.description: Enable a disabled endpoint to resume monitoring

tools.name: endpoint_disable
tools.description: Disable an endpoint to pause monitoring without deleting it

tools.name: endpoint_delete
tools.description: Delete an endpoint and its hosted region assignments

tools.name: endpoint_region_add
tools.description: Add a hosted probe region to an endpoint (Team tier+). Enables KrakenKey-operated probes to scan this endpoint from the specified region

tools.name: endpoint_region_remove
tools.description: Remove a hosted probe region from an endpoint

tools.name: cert_issue
tools.description: Generate a private key and CSR locally, submit to KrakenKey, and optionally wait for issuance. Private key never leaves the machine

tools.name: cert_submit
tools.description: Submit an existing CSR PEM file for issuance

tools.name: cert_list
tools.description: List all certificates in a table (ID, Domain, Status, Expires, Auto-renew)

tools.name: cert_show
tools.description: Show full details for a certificate including parsed cert info when issued

tools.name: cert_download
tools.description: Download the issued certificate PEM to a file

tools.name: cert_renew
tools.description: Trigger renewal of an issued certificate

tools.name: cert_revoke
tools.description: Revoke an issued certificate

tools.name: cert_update
tools.description: Update certificate settings (e.g., toggle auto-renewal)

tools.name: cert_delete
tools.description: Delete a failed or revoked certificate record

tools.name: account_show
tools.description: Show the authenticated user's profile details

tools.name: account_plan
tools.description: Show subscription plan and billing information
